qualification.education_qualification: Graduate of a UGC recognized university or equivalent in any discipline
qualification.details: Graduate of a UGC recognized university or equivalent in any discipline. Desirable: Knowledge of Tally/Accounting Software/ERP/MS-CIT/Stores keeping etc. with experience of 1 year. English typing speed on a computer with 8000 key depressions per hour.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the ARI Pune Project Administrative Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ARI Pune to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download ARI Pune Project Administrative Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ARI Pune Project Administrative Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Project Administrative Assistant post at ARI Pune is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates from a UGC recognized university or possess an equivalent qualification in any discipline.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Administrative Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Administrative Assistant post is 50 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Administrative Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 25,870/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Administrative Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Project Administrative Assistant position at ARI Pune.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 100/-.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for SC/ST and Women candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST and Women candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Administrative Assistant post will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q9. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Project Administrative Assistant recruitment is scheduled for 03rd July 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification PDF and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article.
